CONTENT.Career: Borne started his career with French Ligue 1 side Angers. He was regarded as one of the club's reserve teams' most important players. He started training with the first team during the second half of the 2021/22 season. In 2023, he signed for French Ligue 1 side Clermont. On 21 January 2024, he debuted for the club during a 1–3 loss to Strasourg.
CONTENT.Early life: As a youth player, Borne joined the youth academy of French side Sochaux. He is a native of Montbéliard, France.

SUMMARY: Théo Borne (born 15 July 2002) is a French professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for  Ligue 2 club Clermont.
